subject: [PATCH v2] vfs: remove externs from fs.h on functions modified by i_ino widening

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: Requested removal of pointless externs in fs.h, citing Christoph's previous comment on the i_ino widening series.

2026-03-07.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary extern keywords from functions modified by the i_ino widening series in fs.h, and adds missing argument names to function declarations.
